overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a rainy cyberpunk-style urban plaza at night. The player moves through a convenience store, traverses an outdoor dining area with neon lighting, approaches a food vendor stall, and continues into darker surroundings. The scene features heavy rain, neon purple and green lighting, and fallen bodies suggesting recent violence.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic building entrance with neon signage

events.description: approaching and entering the building entrance from the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking toward the glass building entrance and entering the convenience store

entered.detail: futuristic building entrance with automatic glass doors and illuminated frame
green neon sign with Japanese characters above the entrance
illuminated beverage vending machine near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at night during heavy rain, approaching a futuristic commercial building entrance. Neon green signage in Japanese characters glows above the door as the camera moves forward across wet tiled pavement toward the glass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: convenience store interior with merchandise shelves

events.description: entering the convenience store from the covered entrance area
passing multiple fallen bodies lying on the store floor

agents.ego_description: moving through the convenience store interior past metal shelving units and merchandise displays

entered.detail: metal shelving units stocked with various merchandise
multiple bodies lying on the tiled floor suggesting recent violence

segments.scene_description: Inside the convenience store, the camera moves past metal shelving units and a glass refrigerator. Several bodies lie on the floor, indicating a recent violent event. The lighting is artificial and fluorescent as the camera heads toward the back exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza with tables and umbrellas in heavy rain

events.description: exiting the store into the outdoor seating area exposed to heavy rain
heavy rain becomes clearly visible falling through the neon lighting
navigating between tables and umbrellas while moving forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy outdoor plaza navigating between white tables and umbrellas

entered.detail: large white patio umbrellas over high-top tables
tall white tables with matching stools
horizontal neon light strips running overhead
green illuminated vending machine against the railing
large tree trunk in a concrete planter

segments.scene_description: Exiting the store reveals an outdoor dining plaza soaked by heavy rain. White umbrellas and high-top tables line the wooden deck, illuminated by purple neon light strips overhead. A large tree stands in the center as the camera navigates through the seating area toward a distant food stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: CIRRUS COLA food and beverage stall

events.description: approaching the CIRRUS COLA food stall with illuminated signage
approaching the vendor standing behind the counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stall counter and observing the vendor behind the service area

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing tank top and headband standing behind the counter with arms resting on the surface

entered.detail: food stall with prominent blue and red CIRRUS COLA signage
metal stools lined up at the food counter
illuminated menu displays above the service window
plate with sandwiches and drinks on the counter surface

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the CIRRUS COLA food stall, sheltered from the rain by a large canopy with bright neon signage. A vendor stands behind the counter near a platter of sandwiches and drinks. The area is lit by vibrant blue and red neon lights as the camera moves up to the service counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer plaza edge transitioning to darker walkway

events.description: leaving the CIRRUS COLA stall and moving into a darker area of the plaza
entering a much darker section with minimal neon lighting and dense foliage

agents.ego_description: moving away from the food stall through the outer plaza into increasingly dim surroundings

entered.detail: orange and green shipping container structure with door
thick dark trees and bushes surrounding the pathway

segments.scene_description: Leaving the CIRRUS COLA stall behind, the camera moves into a darker section of the plaza with minimal lighting. An orange shipping container structure appears on the right as the path becomes surrounded by dense foliage. The neon lights fade into the distance as the scene becomes progressively darker.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked commercial entrance through a violent interior and into a neon-lit plaza that eventually fades into darkness. It begins by approaching a futuristic building under heavy rain, moving past glowing green Japanese signage across wet tiles and through the glass entrance. As the camera enters the convenience store, the artificial fluorescent light reveals metal shelving and bodies strewn across the floor before the path leads toward a back exit. The scene then opens into an outdoor dining plaza where purple neon strips illuminate white umbrellas and a central tree, guiding the movement toward a brightly lit CIRRUS COLA food stall with blue and red signage. Finally, the camera leaves the vibrant glow of the vendor behind, moving past an orange shipping container and into a dim area where dense foliage swallows the light.
